attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs: {"answer": "ReAct is a method for synergizing reasoning and acting in large language models, allowing for combined reasoning and action using an LLM applied to an interactive environment within a closed-loop system, as described in REACT.pdf. It uses chain-of-thought prompting to generate both reasoning traces and action plans with LLMs, as mentioned in voyager.pdf. Note: Retrieved context had medium/low confidence.", "grounded": false, "confidence": "medium"}
